findings.detail: The template choices are visible, but it may not be obvious at a glance what each one changes.
findings.proposed_solution: Add one-line descriptions under each template chip so I can tell the style difference fast.

findings.detail: The chat is present, but it may not clearly explain how to use it for quick site edits.
findings.proposed_solution: Show simple examples or prompts in the chat, like 'Change my headline' or 'Update my colors.'

findings.detail: The save/publish flow works, but I still have to figure out what happens after I click Publish.
findings.proposed_solution: Make the Save and Publish buttons spell out what they do in plain language, such as 'Save draft' and 'Publish to live site.'

warnings.detail: The template choices are visible, but it may not be obvious at a glance what each one changes.
The chat is present, but it may not clearly explain how to use it for quick site edits.
The save/publish flow works, but I still have to figure out what happens after I click Publish.
